description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a red-tiled gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and a paved driveway. The house features multiple windows with brown shutters, a two-car garage, and a main entrance facing a paved path. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and is bordered by trees and flowering shrubs. The landscaping is symmetrical in the front, with two prominent flowering trees and a trimmed hedge along the property boundary. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper floor partially set back from the lower level. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a red-tiled gable roof, white walls, a garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The property is bordered by trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the garage, main entrance, paved driveway, patio with furniture, and a large tree in the backyard.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, two flowering trees, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the side wall, backyard pool, and a large tree at the rear corner of the property.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house, pool area, patio with umbrella, and the rear garden with trees and shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small overhang, and paved path leading from the driveway; no porch or columns.
